newsSince: Genuinely new, fundamentally positive catalysts since June 9: on June 15 Ouster expanded its Benchmark Electronics manufacturing partnership to support >100,000 REV8 units/year over a 10-year horizon, and on June 17 signed a strategic high-volume supply agreement with AIM Intelligent Machines to equip AI-powered heavy earthmoving fleets with REV8 native-color lidar. The +21.6% move is news-driven. (A small director insider sale ~$79k is immaterial.)

sources.label: Ouster & AIM Intelligent Machines strategic agreement (BusinessWire, Jun 17)
Ouster expands Benchmark partnership for REV8 scale-up (QuiverQuant)

verdicts.rankRationale: Humanoid/robotics-stack lens: two fresh June deals add real commercialization - Benchmark scale to >100k REV8/yr (10-yr) and an AIM high-volume supply pact for AI heavy machinery - converting generic humanoid beta into bookable sensor volume the prior hold lacked. Positive on fundamentals; rerating penalty applied separately.
verdicts.bull: REV8 native-color lidar with locked-in 100k+/yr capacity and AIM volume supply; widening physical-AI/robotics sensor demand.
verdicts.neutral: Crowd favorite already re-rated; still unprofitable on ~$170M revenue.
verdicts.bear: Valuation/momentum extended; lidar competition and design-win durability unproven.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: REV8 scale-up + AIM/heavy-machinery and robotics design wins
